items.name: Bara [Plain / Egg]
items.description: Spiced lentil patties cooked in a thick-bottomed pan, topped with egg.

items.name: Chatamari [Regular / Large]
items.description: Thin crispy rice flour crust, topped with a variety of savoury ingredients.

items.name: Deep Fried Sausage
items.description: Deep fried, served with chutney.

items.name: Spicy Chicken Wings
items.description: Deep fried spicy marinated chicken wings.

items.name: Nepalese Style Chicken Fried
items.description: Deep fried spicy marinated chicken with bone.

items.name: Spicy Chicken Giblet
items.description: Tender chicken giblets, sauteed with a variety of aromatic herbs & spices.

items.name: Tass
items.description: Special toast meat marinated with ginger garlic & traditional spices, served with puffed rice, salad & chutney.

items.name: Bhuttan [Set]
items.description: Boiled goat giblets pan fried with onion & homemade masala.

items.name: Choila [chicken / goat / buff]
items.description: Charcoal grilled, marinated diced fillets tossed on fresh chopped ginger, garlic, coriander & mustard oil.

items.name: Sukuti [goat / buff / Set]
items.description: Dry meat diced and marinated in cumin, turmeric, black pepper, coriander, chilly, ginger, garlic & onion.

items.name: Baji Set [chicken / goat / buff]
items.description: Choila, nepali chiura, aalu achar, vatmas, salad.

items.name: Samay Baji Set [chicken / goat / buff]
items.description: Choila, aalu bodi tama tarkali, kalo vatmas, nepali chiura, piro aalu, bara, egg & salad.

items.name: Nepalese Style Chicken Sizzler
items.description: Marinated chicken grilled to perfection and served with creamy mushroom sauce, veg & noodles on a sizzling iron pan.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Sizzler [half / full]
items.description: Clay ovened boneless chicken fillets marinated overnight in tandoori spices & served with mint sauce.

items.name: Chicken Tandoori Sizzler [half / full]
items.description: Clay ovened whole chicken marinated overnight in tandoori spices & served with mint sauce.

items.name: Meat Platter
items.description: Sausage fried, sukuti, bhuttan, nepalese style chicken fried, chicken wings, chhoila of your choice.

items.name: Samosa
items.description: Spiced boiled potato & vegetable encased in homemade pastry & deep fried.

items.name: Veg Pakoda
items.description: Marinated mixture of onion, chickpeas, flour, chef's special herbs & spices delicately deep fried, served with tamarind sauce.

items.name: Aalu Chop
items.description: Mashed potatoes, mixed with nepalese spices and herbs, then shaped into a patty and fried until golden brown.

items.name: Chatpate
items.description: Hot & spicy mixture of boiled potato, tomato, onion, coriander, lime juice & puffed rice.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Fried plain flour balls, mixture of tasty spicy mashed potato, onion, black chickpeas & refreshing homemade tangy water.

items.name: Chau Chau Sadheko
items.description: Crispy nepalese instant noodles mixed with onions, tomato, shallot, coriander, lemon juice and authentic nepalese spices.

items.name: Gundruk Sadheko
items.description: Fermented leafy greens, called gundruk, mixed with a blend of spices, herbs, onions & tomatoes.

items.name: Vatmas Sadheko
items.description: Fried soyabean tossed in spicy mixture of onion, shallot, fresh ginger, garlic, coriander, lemon juice, nepalese spices & mustard oil.

items.name: Peanut Sadheko
items.description: Peanuts tossed in spicy mixture of fresh onion, tomato, shallot, ginger, garlic, coriander, lemon juice, authentic nepalese spices & vegetable oil.

items.name: Spicy Saute Potato
items.description: Potatoes seasoned with a fiery blend of Nepalese spices, including cumin, coriander, and chili powder.

items.name: Nepalese Style Potato Salad
items.description: Potatoes mixed with a blend of tangy and spicy Nepalese spices and chili powder, served cold.

items.name: Kothey MoMo
items.description: Pan-fried dumplings, crispy juicy delight.

items.name: Fried MoMo
items.description: Golden fried momos, crunchy bites.

items.name: Sandeko MoMo
items.description: Spicy marinated momos with tomato, onion, & nepalese herbs.

items.name: Jhol MoMo
items.description: Steamed momos with flavorful tomato soup.

items.name: Kathmandu MoMo
items.description: Authentic Kathmandu street-style juicy dumplings.

items.name: MoMo Platter
items.description: Combination of 24 pieces of momo's, different style: steamed, kothey, fried & sandheko.

items.name: Jeera Rice
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds and mild spices.

items.name: Pulau Rice
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with vegetables and aromatic spices.

items.name: Butter Naan
items.description: Soft naan brushed with melted butter for rich flavor.

items.name: Garlic Naan
items.description: Fresh naan topped with garlic and herbs, baked perfectly.

items.name: Cheese Naan
items.description: Stuffed naan filled with melted cheese and baked fresh.

items.name: Cheese & Garlic Naan
items.description: Soft naan filled with cheese and garlic, baked to perfection.

items.name: Chips Chilli
items.description: Crispy potato chips tossed in spicy chili sauce.

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Juicy chicken cooked with peppers, onions, and chili sauce.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Crispy paneer tossed with peppers and tangy spices.

items.name: Chilli MoMo [veg, chicken / buff, pork]
items.description: Momos cooked with peppers, onions, and bold spices.

items.name: Chop Suey
items.description: Fresh vegetables, including bell peppers, cabbage, and carrots, stir-fried with your choice of meat tossed in a savoury & slightly sweet sauce.

items.name: Keema Noodle / Rice (Chicken Mince)
items.description: Minced chicken, rich spiced flavor.

items.name: Nepalese Style with Bone [Chicken / Goat]
items.description: Bone meat cooked with a combination of homemade nepalese spices.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Delicious chicken cooked with chef's special pepper gravy.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Chicken tikka cooked with chop masala, capsicum in spiced yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Chicken Korma
items.description: Boneless diced meat cooked in aromatic spice, onion & tomato.

items.name: Mango Chicken
items.description: Diced chicken tikka cooked in freshly blended mango & aromatic herbs.

items.name: Kalo Daal [black whole lentil]
items.description: Slow-cooked black lentil, simmered in a rich & flavourful broth made with a blend of nepalese aromatic spices and herbs.

items.name: Aalu Chana Kerau
items.description: Delicious blend of tender chickpeas, potatoes, and green peas, cooked in a fragrant curry made with a blend of Nepalese spices and herbs.

items.name: Aalu Bodi Tama
items.description: Flavorful Nepalese delicacy that combines fresh bamboo shoots, black-eyed beans, and potatoes in a tangy & spicy curry.

items.name: Aalu Kauli
items.description: Classic & delicious Nepalese dish featuring tender cauliflower & potatoes, cooked in a rich & flavourful gravy.

items.name: Butter Paneer Masala
items.description: Fried cottage cheese cooked in herbs & spices with creamy tomato gravy.

items.name: Mutter Paneer
items.description: Fried cottage cheese cooked in herbs & spices with creamy tomato gravy.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Fried paneer simmered in chop masala, capsicum, spices & tomato gravy.

items.name: Thali Set [veg / chicken / goat]
items.description: Basmati rice, daal (lentil soup), saag (spinach), pickle, papadum, salad & dessert with a curry of choice.

items.name: Gundruk ra Dhido
items.description: Nepalese style buckwheat pudding topped with ghee, saag (spinach), pickle, salad & sweet yogurt with a curry of choice.

categories.name: Biryani
categories.description: Saffron rice flavoured with aromatic spice, medium hot, served with raita condiment of spiced yogurt, cucumber, carrot & roasted cumin seed.
